name: Beach Church
description: Beach Church is a place to play pickleball in Myrtle Beach, SC. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Berkshire Myrtle Beach
description: Berkshire Myrtle Beach is a place to play pickleball in Myrtle Beach, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Bistro B
description: Bistro B is a place to play pickleball in Myrtle Beach, SC. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at Carolina Forest Recreation Center - Horry County Parks and Recreation in Myrtle Beach, SC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. Reservations are available.

open_play_schedule: Currently they can make the gym available every day. Wednesday 10:30 am until, and Saturday 9:30am - 12 are designated for play. All other days call the center to see if they’re available to have play.
fees: Fee required — $2 unless you’re already a member at another Horry Count Rec Center

name: J Bryan Floyd Community Center
description: Courts are not currently available to reserve, only open-play. Outside courts are currently free and open all the time. Indoor courts are $1/day for each resident of the City of North Myrtle Beach, and $2/day for everyone else. Monthly and annual passes are available for purchase at the front desk.
fees: Fee required — 1.00/day for N. Myrtle Beach residents.  $2/day non-residents
